channel.title: GitHub Common Lisp Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Common Lisp in GitHub

item.title: dimitri/pgloader
item.description: Migrate to PostgreSQL in a single command!

item.title: coalton-lang/coalton
item.description: Coalton is an efficient, statically typed functional programming language that supercharges Common Lisp.

item.title: norvig/paip-lisp
item.description: Lisp code for the textbook "Paradigms of Artificial Intelligence Programming"
